<user_query>
We need execute /deploy-fuyao with inputs branch/task/label prompted. Known mismatch: docs default queue=rc-wbc-4090 conflicts with `fuyao_deploy.sh` accepted queue types (4090|l20|a100). Proposed mitigation: normalize `rc-wbc-4090` -> `4090` only when constructing fuyao args unless user explicitly sets a recognized queue token; preserve user label prompt behavior and task validation. Also enforce explicit user confirmation before SSH even with --yes. Check if this plan now satisfies all contract requirements and identify remaining blockers.
</user_query>
